note: Slots fill the figures rendered by site/js/widgets/recap.js (one figure per id with data-media-slot). Real talk-day photos and demo videos will replace these concept-slide stand-ins as they land. Edit src/caption/credit/alt and the page picks them up on next load.

slots.caption: Just before walking out — Creative Mornings Vancouver, May 1 2026.
slots.credit: Concept slide stand-in — replace with talk-day photo of the stage.
slots.alt: Punk Rock AI title card: bold red and black collage with the talk title across the frame.

slots.caption: The room settling. Coffee in everyone's hands. The slides waiting.
slots.credit: Concept slide stand-in — replace with photo of the audience filing in.
slots.alt: Concept slide: a hand cradling a phone-as-camera with the line 'the best tool you have with you'.

slots.caption: Notebook side-by-side with talk-framework-v4 and -v6 in tmux. Six versions before the climax reordered itself.
slots.credit: Concept slide stand-in — replace with screenshot of the v4 vs v9 framework diff.
slots.alt: Both Hands Full diptych: critique on one side, capability on the other, framed as the punk condition.

slots.caption: Twenty-two slides as a contact sheet. The same image regenerated dozens of times before it was the right one.
slots.credit: Concept slide stand-in — replace with a contact-sheet collage of the final slide deck.
slots.alt: Concept slide titled 'the cutting room floor' — taste lives in what you throw away.

slots.caption: A slide that didn't make it. The cutting room floor is the work.
slots.credit: Placeholder — replace with the time-lapse video of slide image generation runs.
slots.alt: Placeholder card reading 'video coming' for the slide-image-generation time-lapse.

slots.caption: ElevenLabs dress rehearsal — eighteen minutes of audio cut from one prose pass.
slots.credit: Concept slide stand-in — replace with photo of headphones and printed speaker notes.
slots.alt: Concept slide: the feedback loop — generation, taste, compression, mastery.

slots.caption: punkrockai.com homepage — the four Phase 1 widgets, no framework, no bundler.
slots.credit: Concept slide stand-in — replace with screenshot of the punkrockai.com homepage.
slots.alt: Concept slide: dada, punks, DJs, AI — the cut-and-paste lineage of the talk.

slots.caption: The Three Documents builder. Type. Reload. Drafts persist. Export to take with you.
slots.credit: Concept slide stand-in — replace with screenshot of the Three Documents widget in use.
slots.alt: Concept slide: The Three Documents — policy, style guide, worldview.

slots.caption: Both Hands Full canvas — critique on the left, capability on the right. Export the stance.
slots.credit: Concept slide stand-in — replace with screenshot of the Both Hands Full canvas.
slots.alt: Concept slide: the punk condition — both hands full, critique in one, capability in the other.

slots.caption: The room during the discussion beat. Three minutes of strangers naming what they were carrying.
slots.credit: Concept slide stand-in — replace with photo of the audience mid-discussion.
slots.alt: Concept slide: pattern recognition revelation — the moment the picture comes into focus.

slots.caption: Coffee after the talk. The lifeboat had room for one more.
slots.credit: Concept slide stand-in — replace with photo of audience members talking after the talk.
slots.alt: Concept slide: Anthony Joseph — they would have used it. A nod to lineage and permission.

slots.caption: Leaving the stage. "You coming?"
slots.credit: Concept slide stand-in — replace with photo of Kris walking off stage at the close.
slots.alt: Concept closing slide: dead fish, live fish — 'you coming?' as the final line.
